examples.english: The tree begins with a seed.

examples.text: لَاعِيَة شَجَرَةٌ تَنْبُتُ فِي سَفْحِ ٱلْجِبَالِ لَهَا وَرَقٌ طَيِّبُ ٱلرَِيحِ تَجْرِسُهُ ٱلنَّحْلُ وَلَهُ لَبَنٌ غَزِيرٌ إِذَا قُطِعَتْ
examples.english: Green spurge or sun spurge is a shrub which grows on the surfaces of mountains, it has good-smelling leaves sucked by bees and copious milk when slit.

etymology.text: Singulative noun composed of شَجَر (šajar, “trees”) + ـَة (-a).
